extraction_method: html (description only) + sample-menu PDF not parsed
notes: No a la carte menu exists by design. Single seasonal tasting menu, $175/person, ~3 hours. 'Plates will be described when served, and a menu will be provided at the end of the meal' — so there is no fixed dish list to publish or capture. Only a dated 'Sample Menu' PDF (s/MASTER-03112026.pdf) hints at structure. CANONICAL tasting-only case: composer must NOT fabricate courses; present the experience + price + pairing, route to recommendation/curation mode. Sister restaurant Carrello (across the street) is the a-la-carte option.
